title: [InstCombine][X86] Only demand used bits for PSHUFB mask values

tests.source_program:
define <16 x i8> @pshufb_mask_trunc_zext_chain(<16 x i8> %InVec, <16 x i16> %WideMask) {
  %trunc = trunc <16 x i16> %WideMask to <16 x i8>
  %zext = zext <16 x i8> %trunc to <16 x i16>
  %trunc2 = trunc <16 x i16> %zext to <16 x i8>
  %s = tail call <16 x i8> @llvm.x86.ssse3.pshuf.b.128(<16 x i8> %InVec, <16 x i8> %trunc2)
  ret <16 x i8> %s
}
tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary doesn't mention type conversion chains (trunc/zext) feeding the mask. The demanded bits analysis can eliminate redundant conversions when upper bits are not demanded by PSHUFB's 8-bit mask semantics.

alive2.src:
define <16 x i8> @pshufb_mask_trunc_zext_chain(<16 x i8> %InVec, <16 x i16> %WideMask) {
  %trunc = trunc <16 x i16> %WideMask to <16 x i8>
  %zext = zext <16 x i8> %trunc to <16 x i16>
  %trunc2 = trunc <16 x i16> %zext to <16 x i8>
  %s = tail call <16 x i8> @llvm.x86.ssse3.pshuf.b.128(<16 x i8> %InVec, <16 x i8> %trunc2)
  ret <16 x i8> %s
}
alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
define <16 x i8> @pshufb_mask_trunc_zext_chain(<16 x i8> %InVec, <16 x i16> %WideMask) {
#0:
  %trunc = trunc <16 x i16> %WideMask to <16 x i8>
  %zext = zext <16 x i8> %trunc to <16 x i16>
  %trunc2 = trunc <16 x i16> %zext to <16 x i8>
  %s = x86_ssse3_pshuf_b_128 <16 x i8> %InVec, <16 x i8> %trunc2
  ret <16 x i8> %s
}
=>
define <16 x i8> @pshufb_mask_trunc_zext_chain(<16 x i8> %InVec, <16 x i16> %WideMask) {
#0:
  %trunc = trunc <16 x i16> %WideMask to <16 x i8>
  %s = x86_ssse3_pshuf_b_128 <16 x i8> %InVec, <16 x i8> %trunc
  ret <16 x i8> %s
}
Transformation seems to be correct!

tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary mentions OR operations specifically, but not AND operations. The SimplifyDemandedBits infrastructure handles AND as well, eliminating redundant AND with 0xFF when bits 4-6 are ignored by PSHUFB.

alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
define <16 x i8> @and_operation_on_mask(<16 x i8> %InVec, <16 x i8> %InMask) {
#0:
  %m = and <16 x i8> %InMask, { 255, 255, 255, 255, 255, 255, 255, 255, 255, 255, 255, 255, 255, 255, 255, 255 }
  %s = x86_ssse3_pshuf_b_128 <16 x i8> %InVec, <16 x i8> %m
  ret <16 x i8> %s
}

tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary only mentions bitwise operations (OR, insert, shuffle) but not arithmetic operations like add. SimplifyDemandedBits can eliminate add with 0 when the result's ignored bits are not demanded.

alive2.log:
----------------------------------------

  %s = x86_ssse3_pshuf_b_128 <16 x i8> %InVec, <16 x i8> %m
  ret <16 x i8> %s
}
